Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: The implications need to cover both individual fairness treating similar applicants differently and group level impacts systematically favoring certain demographics

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
